title: See the half-lit first quarter moon tonight: Look for the shadows of mountains on the lunar surface
description: The moon will rise with its right half lit tonight, creating dramatic shadows on the lunar surface.
content: The moon will rise with its right half lit tonight, creating dramatic shadows on the lunar surface.
